import scipy.ndimage as ndi

def get_cc(grid, val):
    mask = (grid==val)
    labels, num = ndi.label(mask)
    comps=[]
    for lab in range(1,num+1):
        coords = np.argwhere(labels==lab)
        if coords.size:
            comps.append(coords)
    return comps
